children.label: A
children.text: shall have access to any books, documents, papers, and records that are pertinent to any grant or grant renewal request under this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: may periodically request information from a grant recipient to ensure that the grant recipient meets the applicable criteria under .section 1532(a) of this title

children.heading: Application process
children.label: 2 Application process
children.text: The Administrator shall issue a request for proposal regarding, with respect to the grants awarded under , the application process, grant renewal, and suspension or withholding of renewal grants. Each application under this paragraph shall be in writing and shall be subject to review by the Administrator.section 1532 of this title

children.heading: Reporting
children.label: 3 Reporting
children.text: The Administrator shall, to the maximum extent practicable and in a manner consistent with applicable law, minimize reporting requirements by a grant recipient and expedite any application for a renewal grant made under this part.

children.label: A
children.text: national substance use and misuse organizations that work with eligible coalitions, community anti-drug coalitions, departments or agencies of the Federal Government, or State or local governments and the governing bodies of Indian tribes; and

children.label: B
children.text: any other entity or organization that carries out activities that relate to the purposes of the Program.

children.label: A
children.text: evaluate the utility of specific initiatives relating to the purposes of the Program;

children.label: B
children.text: conduct an evaluation of the Program; and

children.label: i
children.text: eligible coalitions and other substance use and misuse organizations; and

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 3 Consultation
children.text: The Administrator shall carry out activities under this subsection in consultation with the Advisory Commission and the National Community Antidrug Coalition Institute.

children.heading: Limitation on use of certain funds for evaluation of Program
children.label: 4 Limitation on use of certain funds for evaluation of Program
children.text: Amounts for activities under paragraph (2)(B) may not be derived from amounts under except for amounts that are available under for administrative costs.section 1524(a) of this titlesection 1524(b) of this title
